candidates.name: Gmail Thread Decay Detector
candidates.pitch: Tracks thread activity timestamps and alerts when engagement drops. Simple to build with Gmail API. Helps prevent deals from going stale.
candidates.pain: Email threads go cold without sales reps noticing, losing deal momentum

candidates.name: Meeting Room Availability Heatmap
candidates.pitch: Overlays all calendars and highlights optimal slots. Built with Google Calendar API. Improves meeting efficiency.
candidates.pain: Scheduling meetings requires checking multiple calendars, wasting time

candidates.name: GCP Resource Dependency Visualizer
candidates.pitch: Queries GCP APIs to build dependency graphs. Cloud Asset API and Resource Manager API are accessible. Essential for incident response and planning.
candidates.pain: Engineers struggle to understand complex GCP infrastructure dependencies

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: LinkedIn Connection Quality Score
candidates.pitch: Uses engagement signals (profile views, message responses) to score connections. Built with LinkedIn data. Differentiates from basic connection managers.
candidates.pain: Sales reps have hundreds of connections but no signal on which are worth nurturing

candidates.name: API Response Stream Visualizer
candidates.pitch: Real-time parsing and visualization of streaming responses. Easy to build with Fetch API interception. Growing trend of streaming endpoints makes this timely.
candidates.pain: Debugging streaming API responses (SSE, chunked transfers) is painful with raw DevTools

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Local LLM Context Injector
candidates.pitch: Captures page context and injects into local LLM tools. Uses content scripts. Streamlines AI-assisted development.
candidates.pain: Developers manually copy-paste context from browsers into LLM prompts, breaking flow

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Semantic Version Page Diff
candidates.pitch: Parses version numbers from pages and shows visual diffs. Built with DOM parsing. Useful for dependency management.
candidates.pain: Comparing semantic versions across documentation pages is manual and error-prone

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: CSS Anchor Positioning Debugger
candidates.pitch: Visualizes anchor relationships and highlights positioning issues. Uses computed styles API. Streamlines CSS debugging.
candidates.pain: Debugging CSS anchor positioning requires manual inspection, which is tedious

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Multi-Account Session Pinning
candidates.pitch: Pins specific sessions while allowing normal browsing. Uses Chrome identity API. Improves multi-account workflows.
candidates.pain: Managing multiple browser identities for testing is clunky and error-prone

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link
